title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: JOKER!! enough with this idle chatter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As promised, we'll return Caesar to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: On the southeastern beach of "Green Bit"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll deposit Caesar there at 3 PM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: His eyes!! Look at his eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I don't know where it is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's the enemy's precious factory, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't worry. We'll dock at Dressrossa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tora-man, have you been there before?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Dressrossa- this is gonna be fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Sanji, I'm hungry. What's for breakfast!?

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
